Display 1
   I2C bus:             /dev/i2c-4
   DRM connector:       card1-DP-1
   Monitor:             MSI:MAG 274QRF QD:REDACTED-MSI-SERIAL

Display 2
   I2C bus:             /dev/i2c-7
   DRM connector:       card1-HDMI-A-1
   Monitor:             DEL:DELL U2720Q:REDACTED-DELL-SERIAL

Invalid display
   I2C bus:             /dev/i2c-9
   DRM connector:       card1-eDP-1
   Monitor:             BOE:NV156FHM-N4K:REDACTED-BOE-SERIAL
